query:
insert into TestRunRevisionAuthors (
                            last_collect_nr,
                            product_id,
                            test_run_name,
                            test_run_date,
                            revision,
                            author
                        )
                        values (
                            $1,
                            $2,
                            $3,
                            $4,
                            $5,
                            $6
                        )
                        on conflict (product_id, test_run_name, test_run_date, revision, author)
                        do update set
                            last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr
